description: Administrators with full access and control over all repositories within the organization.
description_cn: 管理员, 有删除 Repo 的权限

description: Senior developers with write access to all repositories, responsible for major architectural decisions and code reviews.
description_cn: 权限较高的开发者, 例如 Tech Manager 和 Tech Lead, 有修改 Repo 大部分 Settings 的权限, 但无法删除 Repo

description: Developers with write access to specific repositories, focused on particular projects or modules within the organization.
description_cn: 普通开发者, 一般只有读写权限, 不能修改 Settings

description: Non-developer stakeholders with read-only access to relevant repositories, enabling them to stay informed about project progress and documentation.
description_cn: 非开发者, 但需要能访问 Repo 看东西的人
